other_observers: Andrea Robinsong, Jacob Cooper, and Larry Arnold.; report submitted by finder
specific_location: Along Stewart Ditch trail about 1 southwest of Paonia.
description: Bird was not seen well. In fact, it was barely seen perched in a shrub from about 30 meters.Behaviors: Bird sang from a shrub. Did not "skylark" as this species will do often.Call: Song was heard and recording is being submitted.Plumage: unknown
